'''chahawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praecordium|praecordium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praecordium|praecordium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chahawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæhæwæth|chæhæwæth]] || [[word:chæhæwæj|chæhæwæj]] || [[word:chæhæwæsh|chæhæwæsh]] || [[word:chæhæwæ|chæhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahahawath|chahahawath]] || [[word:chahahawaj|chahahawaj]] || [[word:chahahawash|chahahawash]] || [[word:chahahawa|chahahawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahawath|chahawath]] || [[word:chahawaj|chahawaj]] || [[word:chahawash|chahawash]] || [[word:chahawa|chahawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahafwath|chahafwath]] || [[word:chahafwaj|chahafwaj]] || [[word:chahafwash|chahafwash]] || [[word:chahafwaf|chahafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chahawatha|chahawatha]] || [[word:chahawaja|chahawaja]] || [[word:chahawasha|chahawasha]] || [[word:chahawaka|chahawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chahawath|chahawath]] || [[word:chahawaj|chahawaj]] || [[word:chahawash|chahawash]] || [[word:chahawa|chahawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chahawathal|chahawathal]] || [[word:chahawajal|chahawajal]] || [[word:chahawashal|chahawashal]] || [[word:chahawakal|chahawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chahawathatha|chahawathatha]] || [[word:chahawajaja|chahawajaja]] || [[word:chahawashasha|chahawashasha]] || [[word:chahawaka|chahawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chahawathan|chahawathan]] || [[word:chahawajan|chahawajan]] || [[word:chahawashan|chahawashan]] || [[word:chahawakan|chahawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chahawathaoro|chahawathaoro]] || [[word:chahawajaoro|chahawajaoro]] || [[word:chahawashaoro|chahawashaoro]] || [[word:chahawakaoro|chahawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
